name: Construction Manager
one_liner: Dynamic build scheduling for expert owner-builders
persona: Expert owner-builder managing a single residential new construction project
problem: Coordinating a house build across fragmented tools with no automatic cascade when things slip
killer_edge: Material lead times + dependency cascade + mobile daily briefing — nobody else combines these for owner-builders
emotional_north_star: From 'let me check three apps and recalculate what shifted' to 'I open one app and know exactly where my build stands'

in: Material tracking with lead times → order-by dates
Scheduling engine with dependency cascade recalculation
Project data export (JSON, CSV, PDF Gantt)
deferred_m2: Budget dashboard (estimated vs actual spend by stage)
Sharing/collaboration (read-only link for bank, partner, inspector)
Constraint-aware cascade (weekends, inspector slots, weather windows)

design.color_palette: warm earth tones (clay, sage, amber, warm off-white)
